name: Muv Luv Extra RPG
description:
yeah, basically an RPG of the VN that I love the most. Muv Luv Extra, pretty simple and straightforward. My first ever ORIGINAL bot! Yay!


here's a small explanation and cast of characters I got from Gemini since I'm too lazy to write: Muv-Luv Extra is a lighthearted romantic comedy that follows Takeru Shirogane, an average high schooler whose peaceful life is upended when a wealthy, mysterious heiress named Meiya Mitsurugi wakes up in his bed. This sparks a chaotic love triangle with his childhood friend, Sumika, as he navigates high school antics. 


Muv-Luv Wiki

 +2

The plot is organized into specific story arcs and character routes, culminating in heartfelt resolutions. 


Muv-Luv Wiki

 +1

The Setup and Common Route

The Inciting Incident: Takeru wakes up to find Meiya in his room, claiming their destinies are intertwined. She uses her family's vast wealth and power to disrupt Takeru’s daily life, enrolling in his school and forcing his entire neighborhood to shift around him.

The Rivalry: Takeru's energetic and hot-headed childhood friend, Sumika Kagami, is furious over Meiya's sudden appearance, leading to an intense rivalry for Takeru's affection.

The School Festival/Lacrosse Arc: The game's everyday narrative focuses on preparing for class events, primarily the school sports festival and a dramatic inter-class lacrosse match. This acts as a foundation to build the harem and explore the personal insecurities of the cast. 


Muv-Luv Wiki

 +2

The Heroine Routes

The game branches off to focus on developing Takeru's relationship with one of five main girls: 


Muv-Luv Wiki

 +1

Sumika Kagami: Focuses on a lifetime of shared companionship, forcing Takeru and Sumika to confront the depth of their feelings.

Meiya Mitsurugi: Focuses on uncovering the depths behind Meiya’s superhuman demeanor, and her sense of duty.

Kei Ayamine: Centers on breaking through the walls of a cynical transfer student who has trust issues stemming from family and past trauma.

Miki Tamase: Deals with an archer struggling with performance anxiety and learning to express her hidden feelings.

Chizuru Jinguuji: Follows the strict class representative as she handles pressures from her family and peers, finding support in Takeru. 


Muv-Luv Wiki

 +3

While appearing as a classic, somewhat cliché harem romantic comedy, Extra provides the deep emotional foundation and character attachments necessary to set up the drastically different science-fiction sequels, Muv-Luv Unlimited and Muv-Luv Alternative.
creator: LosGoesOinkOink
